UG-99  STANDARD HYDROSTATIC TEST. (a) All pressure vessels shall be subjected to a hydrostatic test at a pressure not less than 1.3 times the maximum allowable working pressure, adjusted for temperature. (b) The test pressure shall be applied with all openings closed, except as permitted by UG-100 for pneumatic testing. The minimum wall thickness shall meet the requirements of UG-27 at test conditions. (c) The test shall be witnessed by the Inspector as required by UG-93. During the test, the vessel shall show no leakage or visible distortion. For proof tests as an alternative, see UG-101. Joint efficiency shall be in accordance with UW-12. Design loads shall comply with UG-22, unless exempted by UG-19 for special construction.
